title: SilkOrFortune
description: To clearly distinguish enchantments on instruments
body:
This small resource pack add different sprites for instrument enchanted with fortune or silk. No matter what other enchantments, no matter in what order. 
You need to install Optifine or CIT Resewn for correct work.

![All sprites of instruments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/R52rH0Ie/images/186819a0fcd67f051b5dd0f53d58bcf68835e732.png)

For override sprites from other RP place this pack upper. It will override only fortune and silk.
